intro: Schismatoglottis subundulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae, commonly known as a type of aroid or philodendron-like plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Bioactive constituents of Schismatoglottis subundulata include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
